name: project-codeguard
desc: Project CodeGuard is an open-source, model-agnostic security framework that embeds secure-by-default practices into AI coding agent workflows. It provides comp…
descFull: Project CodeGuard is an open-source, model-agnostic security framework that embeds secure-by-default practices into AI coding agent workflows. It provides comprehensive security rules that guide AI assistants to generate more secure code automatically.
